This is a shortest path problem in an unweighted graph, which means Breadth-First Search (BFS) is the ideal approach.
To build the graph implicitly, for each word, instead of comparing it to all other words (O(N^2 * L)), change each letter to 'a'-'z' and check if the new word is in the wordList (O(L * 26) per word).
Keep track of visited words to avoid cycles. A Set is perfect for O(1) lookups.
